title: Opinion on cat breeding practices
body: "This opinion reviews the welfare impacts associated with specialised feline breeding practices. It covers risks and impacts to breeding cats, their offspring and future generations from current and emergent feline breeding practices for both domestic and hybrid cats.    The opinion includes consideration of the welfare impacts of genetic conditions, selection of breeding animals and methods of reproduction.    The Animal Welfare Committee sent this opinion to government on 9 September 2024.  You can read more about the work of the Animal Welfare Committee.  "
